name: Synergy 7 Profile HI-CRI
comment: SYNERGY 7 PROFILE is a new projector that has become “the Stallion” in our team of moving heads. With an output up to 55,000 lumens, the Synergy 7 Profile offers incredible versatility and freedom of use. The unit employs a 1050W pure white LED source, coupled with a long excursion 7° - 52° motorized linear zoom with autofocus.  The unit features a rotating framing system with 4 blades.
